message:
fix(engine): update epoch invalidation error variant and harden parser recovery test

- epoch_invalidation_integration.rs: Update two assertions from
  InvalidationError::AlreadyInFallback to InvalidationError::InvalidState
  to match renamed error variant in the engine core.
- parser_error_recovery_integration.rs: Pin loss_matrix fields
  (partial_recoverable, partial_ambiguous, partial_unrecoverable) to 0
  in the resync-edit-bounds test so it targets the skip-bound primitive
  without drifting when global loss-matrix tuning changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
